author: SantiMod
content:
What lies at the core of the NFT-powered metaverse where assets are owned by you? 

 In a new Star Atlas Blog post, read how we're changing gaming from being the effect of prosperity to becoming its cause - with the help of the Galactic Marketplace:

https://medium.com/star-atlas/the-secret-core-of-nft-gaming-future-934f768e74ff
